full_text:
Lu Ji (Gongji) 陸績 (公紀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Ji (陸績), styledGongji (公紀). During his youth, he was said to have stolen an orange from Yuan Shu to give to his mother. Lu Ji was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lu Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
